DECLARATION OF MICHAEL G. PRESTIA IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER COMPLETE AND VERIFIED DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT PHASE 3 COMMUNICATIONS INC. SERRANO, JUAN ANTONIO

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MARC LIPSCHUTZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER, COMPLETE AND VERIFIED DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. WITHIN 5 DAYS, DEFENDANTS PHASE 3 COMMUNICATIONS AND JUAN ANTONIO SERRANO SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES ON ALL OTHER PARTIES, INCLUDING INTERVENOR CCSF. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN FAVOR OF MARC LIPSCHUTZ AND AGAINST PHASE 3 COMMUNICATIONS, JUAN ANTONIO SERRANO AND THEIR COUNSEL IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 1,500.00 TO BE PAID TO MARC LIPSCHUTZ WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further, Complete And Verified Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LEE S. HARRIS OF GOLDSTEIN, GELLMAN & MCSPARRAN LLP, TEL. NO. 673-5600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MARC LIPSCHUTZ'S Motion To Compel Further, Complete And Verified Discovery Responses And For Sanctions is Granted. Within 5 days, Defendants Phase 3 Communications and Juan Antonio Serrano shall serve verified responses on all other parties, including Intervenor CCSF. Monetary sanctions are awarded in favor of Marc Lipschutz and against Phase 3 Communications, Juan Antonio Serrano and their counsel in the amount of $ 1,500.00 to be paid to Marc Lipschutz within 30 days of service of notice of entry of this order.(Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further, Complete And Verified Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Continued To Dec-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lee Harris, Esq. of Goldstein Gellman Melbostad Gibson & Harris LLP, Tel. 415.673.5600, for plaintiff and moving party;
Truman Phan-Quang, Esq. of Santana & Hart, Tel. 415.777.1708, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The parties did not stipulate to the Pro Tem Judge. After argument, PLAINTIFF MARC LIPSCHUTZ'S Motion To Compel Further, Complete And Verified Discovery Responses And For Sanctions is continued to December 23, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Pro Tem Judge to prepare a Report and Recommendation. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Mtn To Compel Further Disco Responses
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on MON-AUG-26-2013:
Lee S. Harris, Esq. of Golstein, Gellman, Melbostad, Harris McSparran LLP [415-673-5600] appearing for MARC A. LIPSCHUTZ, plaintiff / moving party;
Truman Phan-Quang, Esq. of Santana & Hapa [415.777.1308] appearing for defendants / opposing parties

HEARING - R U L I N G re: Plaintiff MARC LIPSCHUTZ'S Motion to Compel Further Discovery Responses. The Court orders the parties to meet and confer to resolve this matter. Counsel are further instructed to email the Judge Pro Tem by September 3, 2013 of the status of their conference. If the parties do not reach a resolution by September 3, 2013, the Court will issue a ruling. Judge Pro Tem: James P. Watson; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Set For Trial On Jan-27-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
